title: Because the School Is There
overview: Chio-chan happily heads to school after spending the whole night gaming, but her usual route is blocked because of construction.

title: Chio-chan and Hosokawa-san
overview: Chio-chan wakes up much earlier than usual.

title: Bloody Butterfly Effect
overview: There are so many dangers on the way to school!

title: Manana, Ootoro, and Me
overview: Chio-chan heads to school with her childhood friend Manana

title: Bump of Slave
overview: Chio-chan is heading to school one day when she sees both Manana and Yuki waiting for her.

title: Bloody Butterfly Effect 2
overview: Chio-chan wakes up earlier than usual and decides to walk through a park to get to school.

title: The Kabaddic Four
overview: Chio-chan and Manana have fun talking about the upcoming physical fitness test.

title: Smoke on the Sailor
overview: Manana and Chio talk about what kind of situation they’d like to be in before they die.

title: Taking the Cherry Blossom in Your Hand
overview: Chio and Manana discuss the career survey path they were given.

title: Manana's School Road
overview: Manana tells Chio how she would’ve dealt with her awkward meeting with Yuki.

title: Thank You, George
overview: One summer day, Chio-chan is faced with the sudden urge to go to the bathroom.

title: Mananacchio
overview: The disciplinary monitor of Samejima Academy’s student council, Shinozuka Momo, has feelings for Gotou-sensei.

title: Everyone's Own Path
overview: Chio-chan is told by Yuki that the head of the Kabaddi Club, Kushitori, is missing.

title: Chio-chan Eludes
overview: Chio-chan spent way too much time playing video games yet again and turns her commute into an imaginary route from a game.

title: Convenience Store Chio-chan
overview: Chio-chan heads to her usual convenience store.

title: Chio-chan and the Duel
overview: Eihira Private Girls’ Academy is a renowned school where only the richest girls go.

title: Remnants of That Day
overview: Chio-chan and Manana run into an old lady who’s always sitting in front of a café, all alone.

title: Yuki-chan Doesn't Care
overview: Chio-chan and Manana head to school with their popular friend, Yuki.

title: Chio Fisher
overview: Chio-chan tries to tell Manana about an exciting new game.

title: Momo-chan's Story
overview: Momo thinks back on how she became a member of the disciplinary committee.

title: Chio-chan Changes Her Image
overview: Tests are an unavoidable part of a student's life.

title: Flat Cut
overview: Chio-chan spots a water pipe and starts talking about it as if it were her ideal boyfriend, which makes Manana laugh.

title: Shinozuka-san, Sugar Content, and the Press Conference
overview: One day, Momo asks Chio-chan and Manana if they’d eat some sweets with her.

title: Thousand Spring
overview: Chio-chan is walking to school by herself when she spots the little girl she had a duel with before.

title: Andou and George
overview: Andou and George have a little adventure.

title: Chio in the Middle of the Night
overview: Chio-chan is busy gaming into the middle of the night again.

title: Apocri!
overview: Manana gets curious about whether she has body odor after watching a news program on TV, so she has Chio-chan smell her.

title: Just One Masterful Method
overview: One day, Andou's little sister Chiharu ends up visiting Chio at her house.

title: Yuki-chan Bares It All
overview: Yuki-chan does some outlandish things at times, but the girls find out she actually spends most of her time naked at home.
